narrative:
Clearcreek Township has 27,842 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.5 percentage points.
